title: Tick Control Highbridge (Bronx) | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Highbridge, Bronx. Protect your family & pets from tick-borne diseases. Licensed experts. Call today for $125-$325 treatment!
intro: Highbridge residents deserve effective tick control solutions to protect their families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick treatment services throughout Highbridge, from the tree-lined streets near Highbridge Park to residential areas along Ogden Avenue. Our targeted approach eliminates ticks at every life stage, ensuring your yard and outdoor spaces remain safe all season long.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Highbridge and the greater Bronx area with eco-friendly, family-safe tick control methods. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of tick infestations in this neighborhood and provide customized treatments with guaranteed results at transparent prices ranging from $125 to $325.
localContext: Highbridge's proximity to Highbridge Park and the Harlem River waterfront creates ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive in grassy areas and wooded pathways. Whether you live in one of the historic apartment buildings along Jerome Avenue or a residential home near the park, our tick control services protect the outdoor spaces where Highbridge families and pets spend time.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Highbridge's access to green spaces like Highbridge Park and recreational areas near the Harlem River creates habitats where ticks thrive. Professional tick control protects your family and pets from Lyme disease, Rocky Mountain spotted fever, and other serious tick-borne illnesses common in the Bronx.

faqs.question: What does the $125-$325 tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our pricing depends on property size and infestation severity. Services include a comprehensive property inspection, targeted treatment of yards, gardens, and perimeter areas using EPA-approved products, tick population reduction at all life stages, and follow-up monitoring to ensure long-term protection.

faqs.question: When is the best time for tick treatment in Highbridge?
faqs.answer: Tick season in the Bronx typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in late spring and early summer. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before ticks become active and scheduling follow-up treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered, family-safe products that effectively eliminate ticks while minimizing risk to children, pets, and beneficial insects. Our technicians provide clear instructions on re-entry times, and treatments typically allow safe use of outdoor spaces within 2-4 hours of application.
